title: Inspect and service LNG fuel systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect and service LNG fuel systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to inspect and service LNG fuel system

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Source and interpret servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with work and manage risks according to safety and environmental requirements1.4 Select and check tools, equipment and materials for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Source and interpret servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with work and manage risks according to safety and environmental requirements1.4 Select and check tools, equipment and materials for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Source and interpret servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with work and manage risks according to safety and environmental requirements1.4 Select and check tools, equipment and materials for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to inspect and service LNG fuel system

elements.title: Inspect LNG fuel system

pcs.text: Carry out inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and AS/NZS 2739 Natural gas (NG) fuel systems for vehicle engines2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and AS/NZS 2739 Natural gas (NG) fuel systems for vehicle engines2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and AS/NZS 2739 Natural gas (NG) fuel systems for vehicle engines2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect LNG fuel system

elements.title: Service LNG fuel system

pcs.text: Carry out service and adjustments according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, AS/NZS 2739, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out service and adjustments according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, AS/NZS 2739, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out service and adjustments according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, AS/NZS 2739, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Service LNG fuel system

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
